identity.name: Riley's Fish & Steak (pre-opening)
identity.address: Financial District / Wellington (155 Wellington St W)

narrative.summary: Michelin-recommended Vancouver chophouse opening April 9. Custom-built live music stage. Tableside presentations, whole salt-crusted sea bass. From Glowbal Group (Black+Blue). Not yet on Google Maps. Worth a focused stop when John is mapping the next design-conscious neighborhood run.
